ec2.instance.cpuoptions.CfnAbout:
Specifies the CPU options for the instance. When you specify CPU options, you must specify both the number of CPU cores and threads per core.

Modifying the CPU options for an instance results in instance [ replacement](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/using-cfn-updating-stacks-update-behaviors.html

ec2.instance.cpuoptions.CoreCount.Description: The number of CPU cores for the instance.

ec2.instance.cpuoptions.ThreadsPerCore.Description: The number of threads per CPU core.
